visualizations.title: Percentage Change Formula
visualizations.description: The algebraic model to find the rate of change relative to the initial starting value.

steps.explanation: Find the difference between the new value and original starting value.
Divide by the original value and multiply by 100 to convert to a percentage.

visualizations.title: Comparing Bar Heights: 80 to 100
visualizations.description: See how the difference of 20 is measured against the starting height of 80 to yield a 25% change.
